name: Idaho Potato Ham-Cheese Salad Supreme
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Cooked ham, cut into julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a jar with a tight-fitting lid, combine the first seven ingredients.
2. Cover and shake until thoroughly combined.
3. Cut potatoes into 1-inch pieces and arrange in a shallow dish.
4. Pour 1/4 cup of the dressing over the potatoes and stir gently to coat well.
5. Set aside for 30 minutes or until the potatoes have absorbed most of the dressing.
6. In an 10-ounce microwave-safe custard cup, place walnuts and butter.
7. Cook on High for 1 to 2 minutes or until lightly toasted, stirring once.
8. To serve, line a platter with lettuce.
9. Arrange potatoes on the lettuce.
10. Toss remaining dressing with ham and cheese.
11. Spoon over the potatoes and sprinkle with walnuts.
12. Makes 4 servings.
